title: Controller Question Envelope
description: Advisory schema for a subagent-originated controller-facing question. A subagent that encounters material ambiguity emits this envelope to the controller instead of silently assuming or directly asking the user. The controller triages each question into a context answer, a bounded assumption approval, or a human-needed blocker. This schema is initially advisory; future contract versions may require it as a typed field in DAG node metadata or runtime state.

question.description: The question summarising what needs to be decided.

whyItMatters.description: Why this affects correctness, compatibility, scope, or validation.

options.description: Selectable options for resolving the question.

recommendedDefault.description: Id of the recommended default option from options[].id.

blocking.description: Whether the question blocks further progress until resolved.

neededFrom.description: Who or what the controller needs to answer.

id.description: Stable option id unique within the question (e.g. 'a', 'b').

summary.description: Short summary of what this option represents.

tradeoffs.description: Cost/risk/benefit tradeoffs to help the controller decide.
